mapper.sql: seh.id, seh.work_card, seh.employee_name, seh.post_skill_salary, seh.target_performance_pay, seh.division_contract_flag, seh.range_change, seh.attribute1, seh.attribute2, seh.attribute3, seh.attribute4, seh.attribute5, seh.create_time, seh.create_by, seh.update_time, seh.update_by, seh.remarks,seh.se_id, seh.lump_sum_wage, seh.base_pay, seh.lump_sum_wage, seh.post_subsidy, seh.seniority_allowance, seh.personal_deductibles, seh.company_deductibles, seh.personal_deduct_accumulation_fund, seh.company_deduct_accumulation_fund

${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.work_card as ${tAlias}_work_card, ${tAlias}.employee_name as ${tAlias}_employee_name, ${tAlias}.post_skill_salary as ${tAlias}_post_skill_salary, ${tAlias}.target_performance_pay as ${tAlias}_target_performance_pay, ${tAlias}.division_contract_flag as ${tAlias}_division_contract_flag, ${tAlias}.range_change as ${tAlias}_range_change, ${tAlias}.attribute1 as ${tAlias}_attribute1, ${tAlias}.attribute2 as ${tAlias}_attribute2, ${tAlias}.attribute3 as ${tAlias}_attribute3, ${tAlias}.attribute4 as ${tAlias}_attribute4, ${tAlias}.attribute5 as ${tAlias}_attribute5, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by, ${tAlias}.remarks as ${tAlias}_remarks, ${tAlias}.seId as ${tAlias}_se_id, ${tAlias}.lump_sum_wage as ${tAlias}_lump_sum_wage, ${tAlias}.base_pay as ${tAlias}_base_pay, ${tAlias}.post_subsidy as ${tAlias}_post_subsidy, ${tAlias}.seniority_allowance as ${tAlias}_seniority_allowance, ${tAlias}.personal_deductibles as ${tAlias}_personal_deductibles, ${tAlias}.company_deductibles as ${tAlias}_company_deductibles, ${tAlias}.personal_deduct_accumulation_fund as ${tAlias}_personal_deduct_accumulation_fund, ${tAlias}.company_deduct_accumulation_fund as ${tAlias}_company_deduct_accumulation_fund
mapper.insert: insert into swm_employee_history (work_card, employee_name, post_skill_salary, target_performance_pay, division_contract_flag, range_change, attribute1, attribute2, attribute3, attribute4, attribute5, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by, remarks, se_id, lump_sum_wage, base_pay, post_subsidy, seniority_allowance, personal_deductibles, company_deductibles, personal_deduct_accumulation_fund, company_deduct_accumulation_fund ) values (#{workCard,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{employeeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{postSkillSalary,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{targetPerformancePay,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{divisionContractFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{rangeChange,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{attribute1,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{attribute2,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{attribute3,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{attribute4,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{attribute5,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{remarks, jdbcType= VARCHAR}, #{seId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{lumpSumWage, jdbcType = DECIMAL}, #{basePay, jdbcType = DECIMAL}, #{postSubsidy, jdbcType = DECIMAL}, #{seniorityAllowance, jdbcType = DECIMAL}, #{personalDeductibles, jdbcType = DECIMAL}, #{companyDeductibles, jdbcType = DECIMAL}, #{personalDeductAccumulationFund, jdbcType = DECIMAL}, #{companyDeductAccumulationFund, jdbcType = DECIMAL} )
mapper.update: update swm_employee_history set work_card = #{workCard,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, employee_name = #{employeeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, post_skill_salary = #{postSkillSalary,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, target_performance_pay = #{targetPerformancePay,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, division_contract_flag = #{divisionContractFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, range_change = #{rangeChange,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, attribute1 = #{attribute1,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, attribute2 = #{attribute2,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, attribute3 = #{attribute3,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, attribute4 = #{attribute4,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, attribute5 = #{attribute5,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, remarks = #{remarks, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, se_id = #{seId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, lump_sum_wage = #{lumpSumWage, jdbcType = DECIMAL}, base_pay = #{basePay, jdbcType = DECIMAL} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: select seh.id, seh.work_card, seh.employee_name, seh.post_skill_salary, seh.target_performance_pay, seh.division_contract_flag, seh.range_change, seh.attribute1, seh.attribute2, seh.attribute3, seh.attribute4, seh.attribute5, seh.create_time, seh.create_by, seh.update_time, seh.update_by, seh.remarks, seh.se_id, seh.lump_sum_wage, seh.base_pay, seh.lump_sum_wage, seh.base_pay, seh.post_subsidy, seh.seniority_allowance, seh.personal_deductibles, seh.company_deductibles, seh.personal_deduct_accumulation_fund, seh.company_deduct_accumulation_fund from swm_employee_history seh where seh.work_card = #{workCard, jdbcType = VARCHAR} order by seh.create_time desc
